since_last: 96% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.83%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 96% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.61% · Gold -0.74% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 96% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.83%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.83%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +1.04%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +3.74%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +3.74%, LRCX +3.50%, PLTR +3.44%, CEVA +3.38%, ORCL +3.33%. Laggards: AES -0.47%, DELL -0.22%, D -0.09%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.14% at $156.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.14% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
